title: Snowborders
description: Puts a red border on snow blocks and a green border on powdered snow so you dont break the wrong ones!
body:
Snow Borders is a resource pack I made to aid in removing large patches of powdered snow in snowy biomes where you might not want them!

Originally this was a private project as I made it in less than 10 minutes, but I couldn't find any packs like this anywhere else so I felt the need to share it with the world!

ENJOY!!!!
